source.requestBody: {"query": "AppTraces | where TimeGenerated >= startofday(ago(1d)) and TimeGenerated < startofday(now()) | where Message has '[MESSAGE-CORE][SEND]' | where Message has 'Fiscal code check passed' or Message has 'Fiscal code check failed' | extend status = case(Message has 'Fiscal code check passed', 'sent', Message has 'Fiscal code check failed', 'discarded', 'unknown') | extend associated_payment = tobool(extract(@'associatedPayment: (\w+)', 1, Message)) | summarize message_total_count = count(), message_sent_count = countif(status == 'sent'), message_discarded_count = countif(status == 'discarded'), sent_with_payment = countif(status == 'sent' and associated_payment == true), sent_without_payment = countif(status == 'sent' and associated_payment == false) by window_start = bin(TimeGenerated, 15m) | order by window_start asc"}
